      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of invoices
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Invoice"
    post:
      operationId: createInvoice
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Create an invoice
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateInvoiceBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created invoice
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Invoice"

  /invoices/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getInvoice
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Get invoice by ID
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Invoice
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Invoice"
    patch:
      operationId: updateInvoice
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Update invoice status
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateInvoiceBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated invoice
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Invoice"

  /invoices/finance-summary:
    get:
      operationId: getFinanceSummary
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Get revenue, outstanding, and pipeline totals
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Finance summary
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FinanceSummary"

  # ─── RATE CARDS ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  /rate-cards:
    get:
      operationId: listRateCards
      tags: [ratecards]
      summary: List rate cards
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of rate cards
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/RateCard"
    post:
      operationId: createRateCard
      tags: [ratecards]
      summary: Create a rate card
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateRateCardBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created rate card
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RateCard"

  /rate-cards/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateRateCard
      tags: [ratecards]
      summary: Update rate card
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateRateCardBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated rate card
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RateCard"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteRateCard
      tags: [ratecards]
      summary: Delete rate card
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  # ─── RESOURCES ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  /allocations:
    get:
      operationId: listAllocations
      tags: [resources]
      summary: List resource allocations
      parameters:
        - name: projectId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: userId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of allocations
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Allocation"
    post:
      operationId: createAllocation
      tags: [resources]
      summary: Create resource allocation
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateAllocationBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created allocation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Allocation"

  /allocations/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateAllocation
      tags: [resources]
      summary: Update allocation
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateAllocationBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated allocation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Allocation"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteAllocation
      tags: [resources]
      summary: Delete allocation
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /resources/capacity:
    get:
      operationId: getCapacityOverview
      tags: [resources]
      summary: Get team capacity and utilization overview
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Capacity overview
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserCapacity"

  # ─── REPORTS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  /reports/utilization:
    get:
      operationId: getUtilizationReport
      tags: [reports]
      summary: Team utilization report
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Utilization report
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/UtilizationReport"

  /reports/revenue:
    get:
      operationId: getRevenueReport
      tags: [reports]
      summary: Revenue by month and project
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Revenue report
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RevenueReport"

  /reports/project-health:
    get:
      operationId: getProjectHealthReport
      tags: [reports]
      summary: Project health status breakdown
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Project health report
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProjectHealthReport"

  # ─── NOTIFICATIONS ────────────────────────────────────────────
  /notifications:
    get:
      operationId: listNotifications
      tags: [notifications]
      summary: List notifications for current user
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Notifications
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Notification"

  /notifications/{id}/read:
    patch:
      operationId: markNotificationRead
      tags: [notifications]
      summary: Mark notification as read
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated notification
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Notification"

  # ─── TIMESHEETS ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  /timesheets:
    get:
      operationId: listTimesheets
      tags: [timesheets]
      summary: List timesheets
      parameters:
        - name: userId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: weekStart
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of timesheets
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Timesheet"
    post:
      operationId: createTimesheet
      tags: [timesheets]
      summary: Create or get timesheet for a week
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateTimesheetBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created timesheet
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Timesheet"

  /timesheets/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getTimesheet
      tags: [timesheets]
      summary: Get timesheet by ID
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Timesheet
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Timesheet"
        "404":
          description: Not found
    patch:
      operationId: updateTimesheet
      tags: [timesheets]
      summary: Update timesheet
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateTimesheetBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated timesheet
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Timesheet"

  /timesheets/{id}/submit:
    post:
      operationId: submitTimesheet
      tags: [timesheets]
      summary: Submit timesheet for approval
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Submitted timesheet
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Timesheet"

  /timesheets/{id}/approve:
    post:
      operationId: approveTimesheet
      tags: [timesheets]
      summary: Approve a submitted timesheet
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                approvedByUserId:
                  type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Approved timesheet
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Timesheet"

  /timesheets/{id}/reject:
    post:
      operationId: rejectTimesheet
      tags: [timesheets]
      summary: Reject a submitted timesheet
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                rejectionNote:
                  type: string
                rejectedByUserId:
                  type: integer
              required:
                - rejectionNote
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Rejected timesheet
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Timesheet"

  # ─── INVOICE LINE ITEMS ────────────────────────────────────────
  /invoices/{id}/line-items:
    get:
      operationId: listInvoiceLineItems
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: List line items for an invoice
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of line items
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/InvoiceLineItem"
    post:
      operationId: createInvoiceLineItem
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Add a line item to an invoice
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateInvoiceLineItemBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created line item
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/InvoiceLineItem"

  /invoices/{id}/line-items/{lineItemId}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateInvoiceLineItem
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Update a line item
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: lineItemId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateInvoiceLineItemBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated line item
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/InvoiceLineItem"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteInvoiceLineItem
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Delete a line item
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: lineItemId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /invoices/{id}/line-items/autofill:
    post:
      operationId: autofillInvoiceLineItems
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Auto-fill line items from approved time entries (T&M)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Generated line items
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/InvoiceLineItem"

  # ─── RESOURCE REQUESTS ─────────────────────────────────────────
  /resource-requests:
    get:
      operationId: listResourceRequests
      tags: [resources]
      summary: List resource requests
      parameters:
        - name: projectId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: requestedByUserId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Resource requests list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResourceRequest"
    post:
      operationId: createResourceRequest
      tags: [resources]
      summary: Create a resource request
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateResourceRequestBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created resource request
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResourceRequest"

  /resource-requests/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateResourceRequest
      tags: [resources]
      summary: Update a resource request
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateResourceRequestBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated resource request
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResourceRequest"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteResourceRequest
      tags: [resources]
      summary: Delete a resource request
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /resource-requests/{id}/status:
    patch:
      operationId: updateResourceRequestStatus
      tags: [resources]
      summary: Approve, reject, or fulfill a resource request
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                status:
                  type: string
                  enum: [Approved, Rejected, Fulfilled, Cancelled]
                assignedUserId:
                  type: integer
                rejectionReason:
                  type: string
              required:
                - status
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated resource request
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResourceRequest"

  # ─── REPORTS (Phase 3) ──────────────────────────────────────────
  /reports/budget-vs-actuals:
    get:
      operationId: getBudgetVsActualsReport
      tags: [reports]
      summary: Budget vs actuals across all projects
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Budget vs actuals report
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/BudgetVsActualsReport"

  /reports/burn-down/{projectId}:
    get:
      operationId: getProjectBurnDown
      tags: [reports]
      summary: Burn-down data for a specific project
      parameters:
        - name: projectId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Burn-down report
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/BurnDownReport"

  # ─── PROJECT TEMPLATES ─────────────────────────────────────────
  /project-templates:
    get:
      operationId: listProjectTemplates
      tags: [projects]
      summary: List project templates (with nested phases and tasks)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Templates list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProjectTemplate"
    post:
      operationId: createProjectTemplate
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Create a project template
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateProjectTemplateBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created template
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProjectTemplate"

  /project-templates/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getProjectTemplate
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Get a project template with phases and tasks
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Template
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProjectTemplate"
    put:
      operationId: updateProjectTemplate
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Update a project template
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateProjectTemplateBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated template
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProjectTemplate"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteProjectTemplate
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Delete a project template (cascades phases and tasks)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /project-templates/{id}/phases:
    get:
      operationId: listTemplatePhases
      tags: [projects]
      summary: List phases for a template
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Phases list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplatePhase"
    post:
      operationId: createTemplatePhase
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Add a phase to a template
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateTemplatePhaseBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created phase
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplatePhase"

  /template-phases/{phaseId}:
    put:
      operationId: updateTemplatePhase
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Update a template phase
      parameters:
        - name: phaseId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateTemplatePhaseBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated phase
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplatePhase"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteTemplatePhase
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Delete a template phase (cascades tasks)
      parameters:
        - name: phaseId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /template-phases/{phaseId}/tasks:
    get:
      operationId: listTemplateTasksForPhase
      tags: [projects]
      summary: List tasks for a template phase
      parameters:
        - name: phaseId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Tasks list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateTask"
    post:
      operationId: createTemplateTask
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Add a task to a template phase
      parameters:
        - name: phaseId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateTemplateTaskBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateTask"

  /template-tasks/{taskId}:
    put:
      operationId: updateTemplateTask
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Update a template task
      parameters:
        - name: taskId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateTemplateTaskBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateTask"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteTemplateTask
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Delete a template task
      parameters:
        - name: taskId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /project-templates/{id}/allocations:
    get:
      operationId: listTemplateAllocations
      tags: [projects]
      summary: List allocations for a template
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Allocations list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateAllocation"
    post:
      operationId: createTemplateAllocation
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Add a resource allocation to a template (relative-day)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateTemplateAllocationBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created allocation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateAllocation"

  /template-allocations/{allocId}:
    put:
      operationId: updateTemplateAllocation
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Update a template allocation
      parameters:
        - name: allocId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateTemplateAllocationBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated allocation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateAllocation"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteTemplateAllocation
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Delete a template allocation
      parameters:
        - name: allocId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /project-templates/{id}/allocations/summary:
    get:
      operationId: getTemplateAllocationsSummary
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Aggregate template allocation totals (per role + grand totals)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Summary
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateAllocationsSummary"

  /project-templates/{id}/apply:
    post:
      operationId: applyTemplateToProject
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Apply a template to an existing project (supports multi-template composition)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApplyTemplateBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Apply result
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApplyTemplateResult"

  /projects/from-template:
    post:
      operationId: createProjectFromTemplate
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Create a new project from a template
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateProjectFromTemplateBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created project
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Project"

  /projects/{id}/apply-template:
    post:
      operationId: applyTemplateAsSegment
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Apply a template to a project as a single segment (one phase task with all template tasks nested under it).
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApplyTemplateAsSegmentBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Apply result
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApplyTemplateAsSegmentResult"

  # ─── CSAT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  /csat-responses:
    get:
      operationId: listCsatResponses
      tags: [projects]
      summary: List CSAT responses
      parameters:
        - name: projectId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: taskId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: CSAT responses
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/CsatResponse"
    post:
      operationId: createCsatResponse
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Submit a CSAT response
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateCsatResponseBody"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created CSAT response
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CsatResponse"

  /projects/{id}/csat-summary:
    get:
      operationId: getProjectCsatSummary
      tags: [projects]
      summary: Get CSAT summary for a project
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: CSAT summary
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CsatSummary"


  /billing-schedules:
    get:
      summary: List billing schedules
      operationId: listBillingSchedules
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: projectId
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of billing schedules
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/BillingSchedule'
    post:
      summary: Create a billing schedule
      operationId: createBillingSchedule
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreateBillingScheduleBody'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/BillingSchedule'

  /billing-schedules/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Get a billing schedule
      operationId: getBillingSchedule
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Billing schedule
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/BillingSchedule'
    patch:
      summary: Update a billing schedule
      operationId: updateBillingSchedule
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpdateBillingScheduleBody'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/BillingSchedule'
    delete:
      summary: Delete a billing schedule
      operationId: deleteBillingSchedule
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted

  /billing-schedules/{id}/trigger:
    post:
      summary: Manually trigger a billing schedule
      operationId: triggerBillingSchedule
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Triggered
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TriggerBillingScheduleResponse'

  /revenue-entries:
    get:
      summary: List revenue entries
      operationId: listRevenueEntries
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: projectId
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of revenue entries
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/RevenueEntry'
    post:
      summary: Create a revenue entry
      operationId: createRevenueEntry
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreateRevenueEntryBody'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/RevenueEntry'

  /revenue-entries/{id}:
    delete:
      summary: Delete a revenue entry
      operationId: deleteRevenueEntry
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted

  /reports/revenue-by-period:
    get:
      summary: Revenue recognition by period
      operationId: getRevenueByPeriodReport
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Revenue by period
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/RevenueByPeriodReport'

  /time-off-requests:
    get:
      summary: List time-off requests
      operationId: listTimeOffRequests
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: userId
          schema:
            type: integer
        - in: query
          name: status
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of time-off requests
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/TimeOffRequest'
    post:
      summary: Create a time-off request
      operationId: createTimeOffRequest
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreateTimeOffRequestBody'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TimeOffRequest'

  /time-off-requests/{id}:
    patch:
      summary: Update time-off request status
      operationId: updateTimeOffRequestStatus
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpdateTimeOffRequestStatusBody'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TimeOffRequest'
    delete:
      summary: Delete a time-off request
      operationId: deleteTimeOffRequest
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted

  /skill-categories:
    get:
      summary: List skill categories
      operationId: listSkillCategories
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of skill categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkillCategory'
    post:
      summary: Create a skill category
      operationId: createSkillCategory
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreateSkillCategoryBody'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkillCategory'

  /skill-categories/{id}:
    delete:
      summary: Delete a skill category
      operationId: deleteSkillCategory
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted

  /task-status-definitions:
    get:
      summary: List task status definitions (ordered by position)
      operationId: listTaskStatusDefinitions
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Ordered task statuses
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskStatusDefinition'
  /task-status-definitions/reorder:
    patch:
      summary: Reorder task status definitions
      operationId: reorderTaskStatusDefinitions
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [order]
              properties:
                order:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: integer
                  description: IDs in their new order, position 0..n
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated ordered task statuses
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskStatusDefinition'

  /project-groups:
    get:
      summary: List project groups (ordered by sortOrder)
      operationId: listProjectGroups
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Ordered project groups
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProjectGroup'
    post:
      summary: Create a project group
      operationId: createProjectGroup
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreateProjectGroupBody'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created project group
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProjectGroup'
  /project-groups/{id}:
    patch:
      summary: Update (rename / reorder / recolor) a project group
      operationId: updateProjectGroup
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpdateProjectGroupBody'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated project group
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProjectGroup'
    delete:
      summary: Delete a project group (sets projectGroupId=null on affected projects)
      operationId: deleteProjectGroup
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted

  /skills:
    get:
      summary: List skills
      operationId: listSkills
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: categoryId
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of skills
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
