```yaml
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Saved views visible to the current user
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/SavedView'
    post:
      summary: Create a saved view
      operationId: createSavedView
      tags: [savedViews]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CreateSavedViewBody'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SavedView'

  /saved-views/{id}:
    put:
      summary: Update a saved view
      operationId: updateSavedView
      tags: [savedViews]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpdateSavedViewBody'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SavedView'
    delete:
      summary: Delete a saved view
      operationId: deleteSavedView
      tags: [savedViews]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted

  /saved-views/{id}/duplicate:
    post:
      summary: Duplicate a saved view as a private copy owned by current user
      operationId: duplicateSavedView
      tags: [savedViews]
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Duplicated view
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SavedView'

components:
  schemas:
    HealthStatus:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
      required:
        - status

    # ─── DASHBOARD ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    DashboardSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalProjects:
          type: integer
        activeProjects:
          type: integer
        atRiskProjects:
          type: integer
        totalRevenue:
          type: number
        outstandingInvoices:
          type: number
        billableHoursThisMonth:
          type: number
        teamUtilization:
          type: number
        upcomingDeadlines:
          type: integer
      required:
        - totalProjects
        - activeProjects
        - atRiskProjects
        - totalRevenue
        - outstandingInvoices
        - billableHoursThisMonth
        - teamUtilization
        - upcomingDeadlines

    ActivityItem:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        type:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        userName:
          type: string
        userInitials:
          type: string
        projectName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        timestamp:
          type: string
        icon:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - type
        - description
        - userName
        - userInitials
        - timestamp
        - icon

    # ─── ACCOUNT ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    Account:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        domain:
          type: string
        tier:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        accountType:
          type: string
          description: "Account type: 'client' (default) or 'internal' (e.g. KSAP itself)"
        isInternal:
          type: boolean
          description: "True for accounts that represent the operating company itself. Mirrors accountType='internal'."
        contractValue:
          type: number
        billingAddress:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        logoUrl:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        convertedFromProspectId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - name
        - domain
        - tier
        - region
        - status
        - accountType
        - isInternal
        - contractValue
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    CreateAccountBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        domain:
          type: string
        tier:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        accountType:
          type: string
        isInternal:
          type: boolean
        contractValue:
          type: number
        billingAddress:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        logoUrl:
          type: string
          nullable: true
      required:
        - name
        - domain
        - tier
        - region
        - contractValue

    UpdateAccountBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        domain:
          type: string
        tier:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        accountType:
          type: string
        isInternal:
          type: boolean
        contractValue:
          type: number
        billingAddress:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        logoUrl:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    # ─── PROJECT ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    Project:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        accountId:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        ownerId:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
        billingType:
          type: string
        budget:
          type: number
        trackedHours:
          type: number
        allocatedHours:
          type: number
        budgetedHours:
          type: number
        completion:
          type: integer
        health:
          type: string
        description:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        internalExternal:
          type: string
        isAdminProject:
          type: integer
        opportunityId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        projectGroupId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        deletedAt:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
        companyName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        accountDomain:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        ownerName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
      required:
        - id
        - accountId
        - name
        - status
        - ownerId
        - startDate
        - dueDate
        - billingType
        - budget
        - trackedHours
        - allocatedHours
        - budgetedHours
        - completion
        - health
        - internalExternal
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    ProjectSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        budgetUsedPercent:
          type: number
        hoursUsedPercent:
          type: number
        daysRemaining:
          type: integer
        invoicedAmount:
          type: number
        pendingAmount:
          type: number
        teamSize:
          type: integer
      required:
        - projectId
        - budgetUsedPercent
        - hoursUsedPercent
        - daysRemaining
        - invoicedAmount
        - pendingAmount
        - teamSize

    CreateProjectBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        accountId:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        ownerId:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
        billingType:
          type: string
        budget:
          type: number
        budgetedHours:
          type: number
        description:
          type: string
        internalExternal:
          type: string
      required:
        - accountId
        - name
        - status
        - ownerId
        - startDate
        - dueDate
        - billingType
        - budget
        - budgetedHours

    UpdateProjectBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        ownerId:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
        billingType:
          type: string
        budget:
          type: number
        budgetedHours:
          type: number
        completion:
          type: integer
        health:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        projectGroupId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true

    # ─── TASK ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        projectId:
          type: integer
        isPhase:
          type: boolean
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        priority:
          type: string
        assigneeIds:
          type: array
          items:
            type: integer
        startDate:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        dueDate:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        effort:
          type: number
        plannedHours:
          type: number
          description: Initial planned hours for this task
        estimateHours:
          type: number
          description: Current estimate of hours required (defaults to plannedHours)
        actualHours:
          type: number
          description: Sum of time entries logged against this task
        etc:
          type: number
          description: Estimate To Complete = estimateHours − actualHours
        eac:
          type: number
          description: Estimate At Completion = actualHours + abs(etc)
        billable:
          type: boolean
        isMilestone:
          type: boolean
        fromTemplate:
          type: boolean
          description: True if this task was created by applying a template
        appliedTemplateId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
          description: ID of the template that created this task
        parentTaskId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        sortOrder:
          type: integer
          description: Sort order within siblings (lower = earlier). Defaults to 0.
        createdAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - projectId
        - name
        - status
        - priority
        - assigneeIds
        - effort
        - plannedHours
        - estimateHours
        - actualHours
        - etc
        - eac
        - billable
        - isMilestone
        - sortOrder
        - createdAt

    CreateTaskBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        parentTaskId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        isPhase:
          type: boolean
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        priority:
          type: string
        assigneeIds:
          type: array
          items:
            type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
        effort:
          type: number
        plannedHours:
          type: number
        estimateHours:
          type: number
        billable:
          type: boolean
        isMilestone:
          type: boolean
        sortOrder:
          type: integer
      required:
        - projectId
        - name
        - status
        - priority
        - effort
        - billable

    UpdateTaskBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        parentTaskId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        isPhase:
          type: boolean
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        priority:
          type: string
        assigneeIds:
          type: array
          items:
            type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
        effort:
          type: number
        plannedHours:
          type: number
        estimateHours:
          type: number
        billable:
          type: boolean
        isMilestone:
          type: boolean
        sortOrder:
          type: integer

    ReorderTasksBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        updates:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              id:
                type: integer
              sortOrder:
                type: integer
              parentTaskId:
                type: ["integer", "null"]
            required:
              - id
              - sortOrder
              - parentTaskId
      required:
        - updates

    ReorderTasksResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        updated:
          type: integer
      required:
        - updated

    # ─── USER ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    User:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        initials:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        capacity:
          type: integer
        department:
          type: string
        costRate:
          type: number
        skills:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - name
        - initials
        - role
        - email
        - capacity
        - department
        - costRate
        - skills
        - createdAt

    CreateUserBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        capacity:
          type: integer
        department:
          type: string
        costRate:
          type: number
        skills:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
      required:
        - name
        - role
        - email
        - capacity
        - department
        - costRate

    UpdateUserBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        capacity:
          type: integer
        department:
          type: string
        costRate:
          type: number
        skills:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    # ─── TIME ENTRY ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    TimeEntry:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        projectId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        userId:
          type: integer
        taskId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        activityName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        categoryId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        date:
          type: string
        hours:
          type: number
        description:
          type: string
        billable:
          type: boolean
        approved:
          type: boolean
        createdAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - userId
        - date
        - hours
        - description
        - billable
        - approved
        - createdAt

    CreateTimeEntryBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        userId:
          type: integer
        taskId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        date:
          type: string
        hours:
          type: number
        description:
          type: string
        billable:
          type: boolean
      required:
        - userId
        - date
        - hours
        - description

    UpdateTimeEntryBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        hours:
          type: number
        description:
          type: string
        billable:
          type: boolean
        approved:
          type: boolean
        taskId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]

    TimeSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalHoursThisWeek:
          type: number
        totalHoursThisMonth:
          type: number
        billablePercent:
          type: number
        byProject:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              projectId:
                type: integer
              projectName:
                type: string
              hours:
                type: number
            required:
              - projectId
              - projectName
              - hours
        byUser:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              userId:
                type: integer
              userName:
                type: string
              hours:
                type: number
            required:
              - userId
              - userName
              - hours
      required:
        - totalHoursThisWeek
        - totalHoursThisMonth
        - billablePercent
        - byProject
        - byUser

    # ─── INVOICE ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    Invoice:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        projectId:
          type: integer
        accountId:
          type: integer
        issueDate:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
        tax:
          type: number
        total:
          type: number
        description:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - projectId
        - accountId
        - issueDate
        - dueDate
        - status
        - amount
        - tax
        - total
        - description
        - createdAt

    CreateInvoiceBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        accountId:
          type: integer
        issueDate:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
        tax:
          type: number
        description:
          type: string
      required:
        - projectId
        - accountId
        - issueDate
        - dueDate
        - amount
        - tax
        - description

    UpdateInvoiceBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
        dueDate:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
        tax:
          type: number
        description:
          type: string

    FinanceSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalInvoiced:
          type: number
        totalPaid:
          type: number
        totalOutstanding:
          type: number
        totalOverdue:
          type: number
        pipelineValue:
          type: number
        byStatus:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              status:
                type: string
              count:
                type: integer
              total:
                type: number
            required:
              - status
              - count
              - total
      required:
        - totalInvoiced
        - totalPaid
        - totalOutstanding
        - totalOverdue
        - pipelineValue
        - byStatus

    # ─── RATE CARD ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    RateCard:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        currency:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        effectiveDate:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        defaultRate:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        roles:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              role:
                type: string
              rate:
                type: number
            required:
              - role
              - rate
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - name
        - currency
        - status
        - roles
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    CreateRateCardBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        currency:
          type: string
        roles:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              role:
                type: string
              rate:
                type: number
            required:
              - role
              - rate
      required:
        - name
        - currency
        - roles

    UpdateRateCardBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        currency:
          type: string
        roles:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              role:
                type: string
              rate:
                type: number
            required:
              - role
              - rate

    # ─── ALLOCATION ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    Allocation:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        projectId:
          type: integer
        userId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Null for placeholder allocations (placeholderId is set instead)
        placeholderId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        placeholderRole:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        startDate:
          type: string
        endDate:
          type: string
        hoursPerWeek:
          type: number
        hoursPerDay:
          type: number
        totalHours:
          type: number
        allocationMethod:
          type: string
        methodValue:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        percentOfCapacity:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        role:
          type: string
        isSoftAllocation:
          type: boolean
        isTimesheetApprover:
          type: boolean
        isLeaveApprover:
          type: boolean
        createdAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - projectId
        - startDate
        - endDate
        - hoursPerWeek
        - role
        - createdAt

    CreateAllocationBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        userId:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
        endDate:
          type: string
        hoursPerWeek:
          type: number
        role:
          type: string
      required:
        - projectId
        - userId
        - startDate
        - endDate
        - hoursPerWeek
        - role

    UpdateAllocationBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        startDate:
          type: string
        endDate:
          type: string
        hoursPerWeek:
          type: number
        role:
          type: string

    UserCapacity:
      type: object
      properties:
        userId:
          type: integer
        userName:
          type: string
        userInitials:
          type: string
        capacity:
          type: number
        allocated:
          type: number
        available:
          type: number
        utilizationPercent:
          type: number
        department:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
      required:
        - userId
        - userName
        - userInitials
        - capacity
        - allocated
        - available
        - utilizationPercent
        - department
        - role

    # ─── REPORTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    UtilizationReport:
      type: object
      properties:
        averageUtilization:
          type: number
        byUser:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              userId:
                type: integer
              userName:
                type: string
              billableHours:
                type: number
              totalHours:
                type: number
              utilization:
                type: number
            required:
              - userId
              - userName
              - billableHours
              - totalHours
              - utilization
        byMonth:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              month:
                type: string
              utilization:
                type: number
            required:
              - month
              - utilization
      required:
        - averageUtilization
        - byUser
        - byMonth

    RevenueReport:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalRevenue:
          type: number
        byMonth:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              month:
                type: string
              invoiced:
                type: number
              collected:
                type: number
            required:
              - month
              - invoiced
              - collected
        byProject:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              projectId:
                type: integer
              projectName:
                type: string
              revenue:
                type: number
            required:
              - projectId
              - projectName
              - revenue
        byAccount:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              accountId:
                type: integer
              accountName:
                type: string
              revenue:
                type: number
            required:
              - accountId
              - accountName
              - revenue
      required:
        - totalRevenue
        - byMonth
        - byProject
        - byAccount

    ProjectHealthReport:
      type: object
      properties:
        onTrack:
          type: integer
        atRisk:
          type: integer
        offTrack:
          type: integer
        completed:
          type: integer
        projects:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              projectId:
                type: integer
              projectName:
                type: string
              health:
                type: string
              completion:
                type: number
              daysRemaining:
                type: integer
              budgetUsed:
                type: number
            required:
              - projectId
              - projectName
              - health
              - completion
              - daysRemaining
              - budgetUsed
      required:
        - onTrack
        - atRisk
        - offTrack
        - completed
        - projects

    # ─── NOTIFICATION ───────────────────────────────────────────
    Notification:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        type:
          type: string
        message:
          type: string
        read:
          type: boolean
        projectId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        projectName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        timestamp:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - type
        - message
        - read
        - timestamp

    # ─── TIMESHEET ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    Timesheet:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        userId:
          type: integer
        weekStart:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        totalHours:
          type: number
        billableHours:
          type: number
        submittedAt:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        approvedAt:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        approvedByUserId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        rejectionNote:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        createdAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - userId
        - weekStart
        - status
        - totalHours
        - billableHours
        - createdAt

    CreateTimesheetBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        userId:
          type: integer
        weekStart:
          type: string
      required:
        - userId
        - weekStart

    UpdateTimesheetBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalHours:
          type: number
        billableHours:
          type: number

    # ─── INVOICE LINE ITEM ───────────────────────────────────────
    InvoiceLineItem:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        invoiceId:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: number
        unitRate:
          type: number
        amount:
          type: number
        taxAmount:
          type: number
        billable:
          type: boolean
        timeEntryId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        userId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        role:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        order:
          type: integer
        createdAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - invoiceId
        - description
        - quantity
        - unitRate
        - amount
        - taxAmount
        - billable
        - order
        - createdAt

    CreateInvoiceLineItemBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: number
        unitRate:
          type: number
        amount:
          type: number
        taxAmount:
          type: number
        billable:
          type: boolean
        timeEntryId:
          type: integer
        userId:
          type: integer
        role:
          type: string
        order:
          type: integer
      required:
        - description
        - quantity
        - unitRate
        - amount

    UpdateInvoiceLineItemBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: number
        unitRate:
          type: number
        amount:
          type: number
        taxAmount:
          type: number
        billable:
          type: boolean
        order:
          type: integer

    # ─── PHASE 3 SCHEMAS ───────────────────────────────────────────

    ResourceRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        projectId:
          type: integer
        requestedByUserId:
          type: integer
        role:
          type: string
        requiredSkills:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        startDate:
          type: string
        endDate:
          type: string
        hoursPerWeek:
          type: number
        priority:
          type: string
        notes:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        assignedUserId:
          type: integer
        assignedPlaceholder:
          type: string
        fulfilledByUserId:
          type: integer
        rejectionReason:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - projectId
        - requestedByUserId
        - role
        - requiredSkills
        - startDate
        - endDate
        - hoursPerWeek
        - priority
        - status

    CreateResourceRequestBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        requestedByUserId:
          type: integer
        role:
          type: string
        requiredSkills:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        startDate:
          type: string
        endDate:
          type: string
        hoursPerWeek:
          type: number
        priority:
          type: string
        notes:
          type: string
      required:
        - projectId
        - requestedByUserId
        - role
        - startDate
        - endDate
        - hoursPerWeek

    UpdateResourceRequestBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        role:
          type: string
        requiredSkills:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        startDate:
          type: string
        endDate:
          type: string
        hoursPerWeek:
          type: number
        priority:
          type: string
        notes:
          type: string
        assignedUserId:
          type: integer
        status:
          type: string

    BudgetVsActualsReport:
      type: object
      properties:
        projects:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              projectId:
                type: integer
              projectName:
                type: string
              budget:
                type: number
              spent:
                type: number
              remaining:
                type: number
              percentUsed:
                type: number
              budgetedHours:
                type: number
              trackedHours:
                type: number
            required:
              - projectId
              - projectName
              - budget
              - spent
              - remaining
              - percentUsed
              - budgetedHours
              - trackedHours
        totals:
          type: object
          properties:
            totalBudget:
              type: number
            totalSpent:
              type: number
            totalRemaining:
              type: number
            averagePercentUsed:
              type: number
          required:
            - totalBudget
            - totalSpent
            - totalRemaining
            - averagePercentUsed
      required:
        - projects
        - totals

    BurnDownReport:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        projectName:
          type: string
        totalTasks:
          type: integer
        completedTasks:
          type: integer
        dataPoints:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              date:
                type: string
              remaining:
                type: integer
              ideal:
                type: number
            required:
              - date
              - remaining
              - ideal
      required:
        - projectId
        - projectName
        - totalTasks
        - completedTasks
        - dataPoints

    TemplateTask:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        templatePhaseId:
          type: integer
        templateId:
          type: integer
        parentTaskId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Parent template task id (for nested sub-tasks). Null for top-level tasks.
        name:
          type: string
        relativeDueDateOffset:
          type: integer
          description: Days from project start_date when this task is due
        effort:
          type: number
        billableDefault:
          type: boolean
        priority:
          type: string
          enum: [Low, Medium, High, Critical]
        assigneeRolePlaceholder:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: Role placeholder (e.g. PM, Developer) — not a user ID
        order:
          type: integer
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - templatePhaseId
        - templateId
        - name
        - relativeDueDateOffset
        - effort
        - billableDefault
        - priority
        - order

    CreateTemplateTaskBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        parentTaskId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: Parent template task id (for nesting under another template task in same template).
        relativeDueDateOffset:
          type: integer
        effort:
          type: number
        billableDefault:
          type: boolean
        priority:
          type: string
        assigneeRolePlaceholder:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        order:
          type: integer
      required:
        - name

    TemplatePhase:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        templateId:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        relativeStartOffset:
          type: integer
          description: Days from project start_date when this phase starts
        relativeEndOffset:
          type: integer
          description: Days from project start_date when this phase ends
        order:
          type: integer
        tasks:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateTask"
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - templateId
        - name
        - relativeStartOffset
        - relativeEndOffset
        - order

    CreateTemplatePhaseBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        relativeStartOffset:
          type: integer
        relativeEndOffset:
          type: integer
        order:
          type: integer
      required:
        - name

    ProjectTemplate:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        billingType:
          type: string
        totalDurationDays:
          type: integer
          description: Total project duration in calendar days
        accountId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        isArchived:
          type: boolean
        autoAllocate:
          type: boolean
          description: When true, projects created from this template inherit autoAllocate=true
        createdByUserId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        phases:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplatePhase"
        allocations:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TemplateAllocation"
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - name
        - billingType
        - totalDurationDays
        - isArchived

    TemplateAllocation:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        templateId:
          type: integer
        templatePhaseId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        placeholderId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        userId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        role:
          type: string
        relativeStartDay:
          type: integer
          description: 1-based day index from project start (Day 1 = project.startDate)
        relativeEndDay:
          type: integer
          description: Inclusive end day (1-based)
        hoursPerDay:
          type: number
        allocationMethod:
          type: string
        methodValue:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        isSoftAllocation:
          type: boolean
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - templateId
        - role
        - relativeStartDay
        - relativeEndDay
        - hoursPerDay
        - allocationMethod
        - isSoftAllocation

    CreateTemplateAllocationBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        placeholderId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        userId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        role:
          type: string
        relativeStartDay:
          type: integer
        relativeEndDay:
          type: integer
        hoursPerDay:
          type: number
        allocationMethod:
          type: string
        methodValue:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        isSoftAllocation:
          type: boolean
        templatePhaseId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
      required:
        - role
        - relativeStartDay
        - relativeEndDay
        - hoursPerDay

    UpdateTemplateAllocationBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        placeholderId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        userId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        role:
          type: string
        relativeStartDay:
          type: integer
        relativeEndDay:
          type: integer
        hoursPerDay:
          type: number
        allocationMethod:
          type: string
        methodValue:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        isSoftAllocation:
          type: boolean
        templatePhaseId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true

    TemplateAllocationsSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        templateId:
          type: integer
        totalAllocations:
          type: integer
        totalHours:
          type: number
        totalPersonDays:
          type: integer
        byRole:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              role:
                type: string
              allocations:
                type: integer
              totalHours:
                type: number
              personDays:
                type: integer
            required:
              - role
              - allocations
              - totalHours
              - personDays
      required:
        - templateId
        - totalAllocations
        - totalHours
        - totalPersonDays
        - byRole

    CreateProjectTemplateBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        billingType:
          type: string
        totalDurationDays:
          type: integer
        accountId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        createdByUserId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        autoAllocate:
          type: boolean
      required:
        - name

    UpdateProjectTemplateBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        billingType:
          type: string
        totalDurationDays:
          type: integer
        accountId:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
        isArchived:
          type: boolean
        autoAllocate:
          type: boolean

    ApplyTemplateBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
          description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) — used as the base for offset calculations
      required:
        - projectId
        - startDate

    ApplyTemplateResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        templateId:
          type: integer
        templateName:
          type: string
        projectId:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
        phasesCreated:
          type: integer
        tasksCreated:
          type: integer
      required:
        - templateId
        - templateName
        - projectId
        - startDate
        - phasesCreated
        - tasksCreated

    ApplyTemplateAsSegmentBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        templateId:
          type: integer
        phaseName:
          type: string
          description: Optional name for the phase task created on the project. Defaults to the template name.
      required:
        - templateId

    ApplyTemplateAsSegmentResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        phaseTaskId:
          type: integer
        phasesCreated:
          type: integer
        tasksCreated:
          type: integer
      required:
        - phaseTaskId
        - phasesCreated
        - tasksCreated

    CreateProjectFromTemplateBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        templateId:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        accountId:
          type: integer
        ownerId:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
        budget:
          type: number
      required:
        - templateId
        - name
        - accountId
        - ownerId
        - startDate

    CsatResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        projectId:
          type: integer
        taskId:
          type: integer
        submittedByUserId:
          type: integer
        rating:
          type: integer
        comment:
          type: string
        submittedAt:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
        - projectId
        - taskId
        - submittedByUserId
        - rating
        - submittedAt

    CreateCsatResponseBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        taskId:
          type: integer
        submittedByUserId:
          type: integer
        rating:
          type: integer
        comment:
          type: string
      required:
        - projectId
        - taskId
        - submittedByUserId
        - rating

    CsatSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        projectId:
          type: integer
        averageRating:
          type: number
        totalResponses:
          type: integer
        ratingDistribution:
          type: object
          properties:
            "1":
              type: integer
            "2":
              type: integer
            "3":
              type: integer
            "4":
              type: integer
            "5":
              type: integer
        recentResponses:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CsatResponse"
      required:
        - projectId
        - averageRating
        - totalResponses
        - ratingDistribution
        - recentResponses

    BillingSchedule:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        projectId:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        triggerType:
          type: string
        triggerValue:
          type: string
        taskId:
          type: integer
        action:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
        percentOfBudget:
          type: number
        status:
          type: string
        lastFiredAt:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string

        - id

        - triggerType
        - action

    CreateBillingScheduleBody:

        name:

        triggerType:

        triggerValue:

        triggerValue:

        status:

        amount:

    TriggerBillingScheduleResponse:

        message:

      required:
        - scheduleId

    RevenueEntry:

        projectId:

        period:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
        method:
          type: string
        notes:
          type: string
        recognizedAt:

        createdAt:

        amount:

        - recognizedAt

    RevenueByPeriodReport:

        totalRecognized:

        methods:
          type: array
          items:

      required:
        - periods

    TimeOffRequest:

        userId:

        type:

        startDate:

        endDate:

        status:
          type: string
        notes:

        approvedByUserId:

        - startDate

        - createdAt
        - updatedAt

    CreateTimeOffRequestBody:

        startDate:

        endDate:

        notes:

    UpdateTimeOffRequestStatusBody:

        skillName:

          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [SOW, Adjustment]
          description: |
            Manual budget entries support `SOW` (project baseline, one per
            project) or `Adjustment` (free-form correction).  `CO` entries
            are inserted automatically by the change-order approval flow
            and are not accepted here.
        description:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
        hours:
          type: number
        documentLink:
          type: string
          nullable: true
      required:
        - entryDate
        - type
        - description

      properties:
        name:

        filters:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/SavedViewFilters'
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [private, public]
```

### `lib/api-spec/orval.config.ts`
```typescript
import { defineConfig, InputTransformerFn } from "orval";
import path from "path";

const root = path.resolve(__dirname, "..", "..");
const apiClientReactSrc = path.resolve(root, "lib", "api-client-react", "src");
const apiZodSrc = path.resolve(root, "lib", "api-zod", "src");

// Our exports make assumptions about the title of the API being "Api" (i.e. generated output is `api.ts`).
const titleTransformer: InputTransformerFn = (config) => {
  config.info ??= {};
  config.info.title = "Api";

  return config;
};

export default defineConfig({
  "api-client-react": {
    input: {
      target: "./openapi.yaml",
      override: {
        transformer: titleTransformer,
      },
    },
    output: {
      workspace: apiClientReactSrc,
      target: "generated",
      client: "react-query",
      mode: "split",
      baseUrl: "/api",
      clean: true,
      prettier: true,
      override: {
        fetch: {
          includeHttpResponseReturnType: false,
        },
        mutator: {
          path: path.resolve(apiClientReactSrc, "custom-fetch.ts"),
          name: "customFetch",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  zod: {
    input: {
      target: "./openapi.yaml",
      override: {
        transformer: titleTransformer,
      },
    },
    output: {
      workspace: apiZodSrc,
      client: "zod",
      target: "generated",
      schemas: { path: "generated/types", type: "typescript" },
      mode: "split",
      clean: true,
      prettier: true,
      override: {
        zod: {
          coerce: {
            query: ['boolean', 'number', 'string'],
            param: ['boolean', 'number', 'string'],
            body: ['bigint', 'date'],
            response: ['bigint', 'date'],
          },
        },
        useDates: true,
        useBigInt: true,
      },
    },
  },
});
```

### `lib/api-spec/package.json`
```json
{
  "name": "@workspace/api-spec",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "codegen": "orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e \"require('fs').writeFileSync('../api-zod/src/index.ts', \\\"export * from './generated/api';\\\\n\\\")\" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "orval": "^8.5.3"
  }
}
```

### `lib/api-zod/src/index.ts`
```typescript
export * from './generated/api';
```

### `scripts/src/hello.ts`
```typescript
console.log("Hello from @workspace/scripts");
```

### `scripts/src/seed.ts`
```typescript
import { drizzle } from "drizzle-orm/node-postgres";
import pg from "pg";
import * as schema from "@workspace/db/schema";
import { eq, inArray, sql } from "drizzle-orm";

const { Pool } = pg;

const pool = new Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL });
const db = drizzle(pool, { schema });

async function main() {
  console.log("🌱 Seeding logistics domain data...");

  // ─── Truncate in safe order ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  await db.execute(sql`
    TRUNCATE csat_responses, csat_surveys, notifications, time_entries, timesheets,
             intervals, key_events,
             allocations, task_dependencies, tasks, phases,
             change_orders, invoices, opportunities, projects,
             resource_requests, prospects, accounts,
             time_off_requests, holiday_dates, holiday_calendars,
             time_categories, activity_defaults,
             user_skills, skills, skill_categories,
             rate_cards, audit_log, users
    RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE
  `);

  // ─── Holiday Calendars ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const [usHolCal, eurHolCal, apacHolCal] = await db
    .insert(schema.holidayCalendarsTable)
    .values([
      { name: "US Federal Holidays",       description: "Standard US federal observed holidays for 2024–2026" },
      { name: "EU Common Holidays",        description: "Common Western European holidays for 2024–2026" },
      { name: "APAC (Singapore) Holidays", description: "Singapore public holidays for 2024–2026" },
    ])
    .returning();

  await db.insert(schema.holidayDatesTable).values([
    // US 2025
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "New Year's Day",  date: "2025-01-01" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "MLK Day",         date: "2025-01-20" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Presidents' Day", date: "2025-02-17" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Memorial Day",    date: "2025-05-26" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Independence Day",date: "2025-07-04" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Labor Day",       date: "2025-09-01" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Thanksgiving",    date: "2025-11-27" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Christmas Day",   date: "2025-12-25" },
    // US 2026 (relevant to current test date Apr 2026)
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "New Year's Day",   date: "2026-01-01" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "MLK Day",          date: "2026-01-19" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Presidents' Day",  date: "2026-02-16" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Good Friday",      date: "2026-04-03" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Memorial Day",     date: "2026-05-25" },
    { calendarId: usHolCal.id, name: "Independence Day", date: "2026-07-03" },
    // EU 2025–2026
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "New Year's Day",  date: "2025-01-01" },
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "Good Friday",     date: "2025-04-18" },
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "Easter Monday",   date: "2025-04-21" },
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "Labour Day",      date: "2025-05-01" },
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "Christmas Day",   date: "2025-12-25" },
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "Boxing Day",      date: "2025-12-26" },
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "Good Friday",     date: "2026-04-03" },
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "Easter Monday",   date: "2026-04-06" },
    { calendarId: eurHolCal.id, name: "Labour Day",      date: "2026-05-01" },
    // APAC (Singapore) 2025–2026
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "New Year's Day",   date: "2025-01-01" },
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "Chinese New Year", date: "2025-01-29" },
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "Hari Raya Puasa",  date: "2025-03-31" },
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "Labour Day",       date: "2025-05-01" },
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "National Day",     date: "2025-08-09" },
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "Christmas Day",    date: "2025-12-25" },
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "Chinese New Year", date: "2026-02-17" },
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "Good Friday",      date: "2026-04-03" },
    { calendarId: apacHolCal.id, name: "Labour Day",       date: "2026-05-01" },
  ]);

  // ─── Rate Cards ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```
